# robots.txt pour Yorix CM — https://www.yorix.cm
# Mise à jour : 12 mai 2026

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sections privées / techniques (non indexables)
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /panier
Disallow: /notifications

# Paramètres d'authentification / callbacks Supabase
Disallow: /*?authTab=
Disallow: /*?code=
Disallow: /*?access_token=
Disallow: /*?refresh_token=

# Recherches & filtres dynamiques (éviter le crawling infini)
Disallow: /*?search=
Disallow: /*?q=
Disallow: /*?sort=
Disallow: /*?filter=

# Ressources à autoriser explicitement
Allow: /sitemap.xml
Allow: /manifest.json
Allow: /og-image.svg
Allow: /favicon.svg
Allow: /icons/

# Crawl-delay pour les bots non-Google (réduit la charge)
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: SemrushBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: MJ12bot
Crawl-delay: 20

# Sitemap principal
Sitemap: https://www.yorix.cm/sitemap.xml
